mechanics.excerpt: Taking the grain alcohol straight is sometimes called Periphery PPC or just plain foolish: LANGUAGE Humankind Iikely would never have reached the stars with- out common language through which scientists could share ideas_ common language opens up markets_ expands tech nology and brings people closer together By the twenty-first century, English had become the Iingua franca shared by most nations_ Terra adopted as the official language in 2092; by the time of the great colonial expansion most colony ships carried English with them: More than one interstellar nation, however; turned other tongues as primary languages, retaining English as anguage of trade and politics_ The population of the thirty first century is generally bilingual, speaking English as primary secondary language_ Many people speak three more languages, depending o their level ot education.
